title: Using OKTA as SAML provider
excerpt:
Hi, 
We are evaluating using Okta as SAML provider. If we complete the setup in both Okta and Monday.com , which URL should our end-users login to ? Is it still Monday.com ? Or is it Okta ? 
Thanks.

posts.author: steven.su (Steven Su)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

We are evaluating using Okta as SAML provider. If we complete the setup in both Okta and Monday.com , which URL should our end-users login to ? Is it still Monday.com ? Or is it Okta ?
Thanks.

posts.author: bradley (Bradley Vanderhorst)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @steven.su

Not sure if you got the answer to this, but your team should be able to use your direct account slug “accountname.monday.com” or use Okta to click and take you to the monday.com account to log in.

Let me know if that works.
